behavioral_profile.primary_role: bounded AOR execution and OpenClaw schedule executor
strengths: runs registered AOR workflows through the canonical ChaseOS pipeline
maintains strong CGL compliance in recorded scorecard history
can consume schedule intent exported from runtime/schedules/

known_failure_modes.description: Recorded scorecard history contains escalated workflow runs. These remain incident-level repair candidates until a repeated fix is confirmed.

routing_guidance: orient through OpenClaw adapter/profile docs before acting
read schedule export rather than maintaining independent cron truth
escalate protected-file, canonical-promotion, and undeclared connector expansion requests

governance_boundary: Layer C memory is advisory and cannot override Gate, role cards, workflow manifests, or operator approval.
